name: linActivateSlot
title: linActivateSlot
description: Reactivates a schedule table slot defined in the LIN database file (LDF), after having been previously deactivated by linDeactivateSlot().
Schedule slots containing MasterRequests are automatically sent only if their data is updated i.e. using output().
If the Master node is not simulated or no schedule tables are defined, then this function will have no effect.

parameters.name: tableIndex
parameters.description: Schedule table index according to the LIN database file (LDF). First table in the LDF has the index 0.

return: On success, a value unequal to zero, otherwise zero.
